title: athyrium × anceps
intro: Athyrium × anceps, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Athyrium filix-femina and Athyrium plicatum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium × anceps include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Athyrium × anceps can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
